task_completion.description: Subsurface application is active and displaying the dive log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subsurface window is open and visible, showing a list of dives in the main pane.

task_completion.description: The Equipment tab is accessed to inspect cylinder data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Equipment' or 'Cylinders' tab is selected in the details pane of the Subsurface interface.

task_completion.description: Extra cylinders are removed so that exactly one cylinder remains per dive.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The equipment tab shows exactly one cylinder row for the selected dive(s), with visual evidence of deletion actions (e.g., clicking a trash can/remove icon next to extra cylinders).

task_completion.description: No dives were deleted from the dive log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main dive list remains fully populated (showing 29 dives) without any rows being removed or the total count decreasing.

task_completion.description: The dive log file is saved after modifications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save' icon is clicked, 'File -> Save' is selected from the menu, or the window title bar no longer shows an unsaved changes indicator (such as an asterisk).

integrity.description: The agent used the Subsurface GUI to remove the cylinders.
integrity.visual_evidence: Mouse clicks and interactions occur within the Subsurface application's equipment tab, rather than using a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open executing scripts (e.g., Python, sed, awk) to directly parse and modify the .ssrf XML file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Subsurface application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen shows the authentic Subsurface interface with its standard layout (dive list, profile graph, details tabs) rather than a mock-up or generic text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target file is '/home/ga/Documents/dives.ssrf'. The final state must have exactly 1 cylinder per dive. Note: Although the task description mentions 8 dives, the file actually contains 29 dives. The agent must preserve all 29 dives without deleting any.
